name: xtended
description:
Co-create schemas with your AI — typed fields, relationships, SQL-like constraints. Turn unstructured content into a curated database built for insights.

Platform integrations such as PostHog and Microsoft built-in and expanding. Any HTTP API via OpenAPI import. One MCP connection gives your agent full CRUD, semantic search, and a structured knowledge base that grows correctly over time.
